metadata.description: Community-maintained reference for replica watch buyers — trusted dealers, factory guide, glossary, and newbie walkthrough.

who_makes_the_best.notes: Very good but not super rep

newbie_guide.title: How to Buy a Replica Watch
newbie_guide.summary: Step-by-step walkthrough from choosing a trusted dealer to receiving your watch. Based on community knowledge from RepTime, RWI, and RepGeek.

steps.title: Choose a trusted dealer
paragraphs: A Trusted Dealer (TD) is a seller vetted by one of the major forums — RWI, RepGeek, or RWG. They've built a track record with a large customer base and are subject to active forum moderation if a transaction goes wrong. Most TDs offer a customs seizure guarantee.
Use our TD List or the official forum TD pages to find a dealer. Any TD can source any watch currently in production — their websites are catalogs, not inventories.

callouts.title: Never Google a TD website.
callouts.body: There are known scammers using similar-looking domains. Only use links from this site or from official forum TD lists

callouts.title: RepTime has no official TDs.
callouts.body: Dealers with "trusted" flair on Reddit hold that status through external forums

steps.title: Choose your watch and factory
paragraphs: Replicas are built by specific factories — CF, VSF, ZF, BP, GMF, EWF, and others. Quality depends heavily on which factory made it. Use the community's factory guide to find the best version of the model you want.

steps.title: Place your order
paragraphs: Confirm with your TD that the factory still produces the watch ("in stock"). Three ways to order:

options.title: Option A: WhatsApp (recommended)
content: Fastest method. Message your TD with the model and factory:
Remember time zones — allow 12–24 hours for a reply during busy periods.

options.title: Option B: TD website
content: Email the TD first to confirm the watch is still produced — many websites are outdated. This route is slower.

options.title: Option C: Email or forum DM
content: Some TDs are only reachable this way. Slowest option.

chat_examples: You: Hi, can you source me a VSF 116610LN? In stock? How long for QC and how much?
TD: Hi, $568 free shipping. In stock, 3-day QC.

callouts.title: Do not enter credit or debit card details
callouts.body: on TD websites. Use the payment methods below

steps.title: Payment
paragraphs: Most TDs will guide you through payment:

payment_methods.name: Wise
payment_methods.description: Best rates, easy to use. Recommended

payment_methods.name: PayPal F&F
payment_methods.description: Some TDs accept. May require prior history

payment_methods.name: Crypto
payment_methods.description: Send to TD's wallet. Record the transaction

callouts.title: Avoid credit/debit cards
callouts.body: unless using a one-time virtual card number. The third-party payment processor may not be trustworthy

steps.title: Quality control (QC)
paragraphs: After payment, the TD sends QC photos of your specific watch. Can take hours to 2 weeks.
tips: No QC in 2 weeks? Message your TD for an update
Post QC photos to r/RepTimeQC for community feedback
Look up previous QC posts for the same model
GL (green light) = accept. RL (red light) = request different unit
Actually check the details — don't just write "looks good"

steps.title: Shipping and delivery
paragraphs: Takes 1 week to 2 months. Use 17Track to monitor. Most TDs include customs seizure warranty.

callouts.title: Customs letter?
callouts.body: Do not reply. Contact your TD. Wait it out

steps.title: Receiving your watch
tips: Bracelet: Buy a decent removal tool before the watch arrives
Accuracy: ±30 sec/day is normal unserviced. Get it serviced for better performance
Water resistance: Assume NOT water resistant until tested
Problems? Work it out with TD first. File dispute on their forum if needed

callouts.title: ✓ Tip:
callouts.body: Don't pretend it's genuine at a jeweler — they'll know. Being upfront is always better

terms.definition: Replica — a copy of a genuine watch.
Genuine — the authentic version of a watch.
A low-quality replica, usually from DHGate or AliExpress.
Adding genuine or aftermarket parts to a replica to make it closer to gen. Common upgrades: crystals, bezels, dials.
Not Worth Buying In Gen — the replica is so close that buying genuine isn't justified for most people.
"Where to cop" — asking where someone bought a watch or requesting a link.
Flaws in a replica that distinguish it from genuine. All reps have tells.
Trusted Dealer — vetted and approved by a major forum (RWI, RepGeek, RWG). Subject to forum moderation.
Replica Watch Info — one of the largest and oldest forums with strict TD vetting.
Replica Watch Geek — major forum with its own TD list and active community.
Replica Watch Group — established forum with its own TD roster.
r/RepTime on Reddit — largest community. Has no official TDs; trusted flair comes from external forums.
r/ChinaTime — focused on budget replicas ($30–$120) from DHGate and AliExpress.
Quality Control — photos/video of your specific watch sent by the TD before shipping.
Green Light — approve the watch for shipping.
Red Light — reject the watch, request a different unit.
Factory currently producing the watch. Always confirm with your TD before ordering.
Most TDs guarantee a free replacement if your watch is seized by customs.
Top Rolex specialist — Submariner, GMT-Master II, Daytona.
Best for Omega (Seamaster, Planet Ocean) and Panerai. Excellent finishing.
Known for AP, IWC, and Patek Philippe.
Rolex Daytona and Datejust. Great bracelet quality.
Budget Rolex factory. Decent quality, lower price.
Rolex Day-Date and Datejust models.
Once top-tier (famous for Daytona). Shut down after raid. No longer producing.
Sapphire crystal with 2 layers of anti-reflective coating.
Solid End Link — connects bracelet to case. Tight fit = quality sign.
Date Wheel — disc showing the date. Alignment and font are common QC points.
Magnifying lens over date window. 2.5x on gen; a common tell on reps.
Ring around the dial. Alignment is a frequent QC check.
Luminescent material on hands and indices. Color and application are QC points.
Inner ring between dial and crystal. Engraved on Rolex — alignment is a tell.
Replica movement mimicking the genuine caliber visually and functionally.
Chinese marketplaces selling bottom-tier replicas. No QC, buyer beware.
Tracking app for international shipments. Recommended for monitoring delivery.
International money transfer service. Good rates, easy to use. Common TD payment method.
Community joke for the Reddit search bar. "Use Serge Barr" = search before asking.

factories.title: Factories & Quality Tiers
factories.intro: Understanding which factory makes the best version of your desired model is the most important step in choosing your watch.

quality_tiers.label: HIGH TIER
quality_tiers.name: Top factory replicas
quality_tiers.description: Clean, VSF, ZF, etc. 904L steel, sapphire crystal, clone movements. Closely resembles genuine in look, feel, and weight. Minor tells only.

quality_tiers.label: MID TIER
quality_tiers.name: Budget factory replicas
quality_tiers.description: Good quality but lacking finer details. Solid option at a lower price if you accept minor inaccuracies.

quality_tiers.label: BOTTOM
quality_tiers.name: DHGate / AliExpress
quality_tiers.description: Cheap, no QC, poor materials. Barely resemble the originals. Only for tight budgets with zero expectations.

community_guides.name: "Who makes the best?"
community_guides.description: Best factory for each popular model — the single most important resource

community_guides.name: NWBIG list
community_guides.description: "Not Worth Buying In Gen" — replica so close that genuine isn't worth the premium

community_guides.name: Rolex clasp codes
community_guides.description: Serial numbers and clasp codes for Rolex replicas

gold_wrapping_diamonds.title: Gold plating
gold_wrapping_diamonds.description: Copper-based mixture approximating gold color. Significant scratches show steel underneath. Normal wear holds up well.

gold_wrapping_diamonds.title: Gold wrapping
gold_wrapping_diamonds.description: Thicker, higher gold %. Can be lightly buffed. Notable step up from plating.

gold_wrapping_diamonds.title: Diamonds
gold_wrapping_diamonds.description: CZ stones. Inconsistent placement, may fall out. Fine at a distance, won't hold up to close inspection.

movements.description: ±30 sec/day is normal and acceptable unserviced
Proper cleaning, oiling, regulation. Check RWI for watchmakers
Higher-tier reps use clones that mimic genuine calibers
Advance hour hand until date changes, move to 6 o'clock, then adjust date

callouts.title: TDs don't make watches.
callouts.body: They're middlemen who order from factories in bulk and issue QC photos. This is why QC can be delayed

callouts.title: Factory status changes.
callouts.body: What was best 6 months ago may not be today. Always check current forum discussions
